'''kapopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicardipine|nicardipine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicardipine|nicardipine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kapopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæpepeth|kæpepeth]] || [[word:kæpepej|kæpepej]] || [[word:kæpepesh|kæpepesh]] || [[word:kæpepe|kæpepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapopopoth|kapopopoth]] || [[word:kapopopoj|kapopopoj]] || [[word:kapopoposh|kapopoposh]] || [[word:kapopopo|kapopopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapopoth|kapopoth]] || [[word:kapopoj|kapopoj]] || [[word:kapoposh|kapoposh]] || [[word:kapopo|kapopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapofpoth|kapofpoth]] || [[word:kapofpoj|kapofpoj]] || [[word:kapofposh|kapofposh]] || [[word:kapofpof|kapofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kapopotho|kapopotho]] || [[word:kapopojo|kapopojo]] || [[word:kapoposho|kapoposho]] || [[word:kapopoko|kapopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kapopoth|kapopoth]] || [[word:kapopoj|kapopoj]] || [[word:kapoposh|kapoposh]] || [[word:kapopo|kapopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kapopothol|kapopothol]] || [[word:kapopojol|kapopojol]] || [[word:kapoposhol|kapoposhol]] || [[word:kapopokol|kapopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kapopothotho|kapopothotho]] || [[word:kapopojojo|kapopojojo]] || [[word:kapoposhosho|kapoposhosho]] || [[word:kapopoko|kapopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kapopothon|kapopothon]] || [[word:kapopojon|kapopojon]] || [[word:kapoposhon|kapoposhon]] || [[word:kapopokon|kapopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kapopothoro|kapopothoro]] || [[word:kapopojoro|kapopojoro]] || [[word:kapoposhoro|kapoposhoro]] || [[word:kapopokoro|kapopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
